title: Item Scale
description: Allows you to change the size of items - and has options for specific items - and a scale by distance option.
body:
**Item Drops Scale**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Allows you to change the size of dropped items and the size that they are. /itemscale set distance (amount) (this is for dynamic scale depending on distance 0 = off 0.01 = recommended or 0.1 ---
**Showcase** _Distance Scaling Setting in action (the strength is changeable)_ ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hYTvGCAq/images/0d46082faed1aca1cbe4c3ed5240829296afc7e0.gif) _Here's an example of different items sizes being changed._ ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hYTvGCAq/images/e27ca9781decaeaf5effe9ee52a8d1751d17321d.gif)
--- - /itemscale - /itemscale set global - /itemscale set distance - /itemscale set - /itemscale set - /itemscale get global - /itemscale get distance - /itemscale get - /itemscale get - /itemscale reset global - /itemscale reset distance - /itemscale reset - /itemscale reset - /itemscale list **Requires YACL and Mod Menu** have any questions? need help? want to report a bug? Request a something added to the mod? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!** [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
